mapper.select: SELECT al.REAL_DEPTH , al.MENU_SEQ , IFNULL(al.ROLE_ID, "") AS ROLE_ID , IFNULL(al.PAR_ID, "") AS PAR_ID , IFNULL(al.MENU_ID, "") AS MENU_ID , IFNULL(al.MENU_CODE, "") AS MENU_CODE , IFNULL(al.MENU_NAME, "") AS MENU_NAME , IFNULL(al.MENU_ENG_NAME, "") AS MENU_ENG_NAME , al.MENU_FULL_PATH , IFNULL(al.MENU_DEPTH, 0) AS MENU_DEPTH , IFNULL(al.MENU_ORDER, 0) AS MENU_ORDER , IFNULL(al.MENU_TYPE, 'unused') AS MENU_TYPE , IFNULL(al.MENU_STAT, 'use') AS MENU_STAT , IFNULL(al.MENU_REG_ID, "") AS MENU_REG_ID , al.MENU_REG_DT , al.MENU_REG_TIME , IFNULL(al.MENU_MOD_ID, "") AS MENU_MOD_ID , al.MENU_MOD_DT , al.MENU_MOD_TIME , IFNULL(al.MENU_URL, "") AS MENU_URL , IFNULL(hmm.MEM_SEQ, "") AS AUTH_MEM_SEQ , IFNULL(hmm.MEM_ID, "") AS AUTH_MEM_ID , IFNULL(hmm.MENU_ID, "") AS AUTH_MENU_ID , IFNULL(hmm.ROLE_ID, "") AS AUTH_ROLE_ID , IFNULL(hmm.MENU_USE, "") AS AUTH_MENU_USE FROM ( SELECT fnc.LEVEL AS REAL_DEPTH , hc_mn.MENU_SEQ , hc_mn.ROLE_ID , hc_mn.PAR_ID , hc_mn.MENU_ID , hc_mn.MENU_CODE , hc_mn.MENU_NAME , hc_mn.MENU_ENG_NAME , fnGetMenuFullPath(hc_mn.MENU_ID) AS MENU_FULL_PATH , hc_mn.MENU_DEPTH , hc_mn.MENU_ORDER , hc_mn.MENU_TYPE , hc_mn.MENU_STAT , hc_mn.MENU_REG_ID , DATE_FORMAT(hc_mn.MENU_REG_DT,'%Y%m%d') AS MENU_REG_DT , DATE_FORMAT(hc_mn.MENU_REG_DT,'%H%i%S') AS MENU_REG_TIME , hc_mn.MENU_MOD_ID , DATE_FORMAT(hc_mn.MENU_MOD_DT,'%Y%m%d') AS MENU_MOD_DT , DATE_FORMAT(hc_mn.MENU_MOD_DT,'%H%i%S') AS MENU_MOD_TIME , hc_mn.MENU_URL FROM ( SELECT FNGETMENUTREE() AS MENU_ID , @level AS LEVEL FROM (SELECT @start_with:=0, @menu_id:='system', @level:=0) vars JOIN HC_MENU hm ON hm.MENU_ID != 'system' WHERE @menu_id IS NOT NULL ) fnc LEFT JOIN HC_MENU hc_mn ON fnc.MENU_ID = hc_mn.MENU_ID ) al LEFT OUTER JOIN HC_MEMBER_MENU hmm ON al.MENU_ID = hmm.MENU_ID AND hmm.MEM_SEQ = #{seq} AND hmm.MEM_ID = #{memId} WHERE 1=1 AND al.MENU_STAT = 'use' AND (hmm.MENU_USE IS NULL || hmm.MENU_USE = 'Y' ) AND (al.ROLE_ID = 'ALL' OR al.ROLE_ID = #{roleId})

choose.when: AND ( MEM_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR MEM_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR DEPT_CODE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR DEPT_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR DEPT_ENG_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') )

choose.otherwise: AND ( MEM_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR MEM_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR DEPT_CODE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR DEPT_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR DEPT_ENG_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') )

choose.when: AND ( DEPT_CODE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR DEPT_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR DEPT_ENG_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') )

choose.otherwise: AND ( DEPT_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR DEPT_CODE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR DEPT_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR DEPT_ENG_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') )

if.test: searchAuthType != null and searchAuthType != '' and searchKeyword != null and searchKeyword != ''

choose.when: AND ( mem.MEM_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR mem.MEM_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR mem.DEPT_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR mem.MEM_PHONE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') )
AND ( BR_CODE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR EM_CODE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR MSG_TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') )
AND ( upper(channel) LIKE CONCAT('%', 'CRM', '%') OR upper(channel) LIKE CONCAT('%', 'IBK', '%') OR upper(channel) LIKE CONCAT('%', 'TEST', '%') )

AND ( upper(selectLabel) LIKE CONCAT('%', '기존계약', '%') OR upper(selectLabel) LIKE CONCAT('%', '고객관리', '%') OR upper(selectLabel) LIKE CONCAT('%', '심의필', '%') OR upper(selectLabel) LIKE CONCAT('%', '미심의', '%') OR upper(selectLabel) LIKE CONCAT('%', '테스트', '%') )

AND ( upper(selectLabel) LIKE CONCAT('%', '기존계약', '%') OR upper(selectLabel) LIKE CONCAT('%', '고객관리', '%') OR upper(selectLabel) LIKE CONCAT('%', '심의필', '%') OR upper(selectLabel) LIKE CONCAT('%', '미심의', '%') OR upper(selectLabel) LIKE CONCAT('%', '테스트', '%') )
